commands.review_summary:
The branch centralizes a generic reply-media failure warning, appends it when reply media normalization drops or clears media, suppresses generated warning text for silent `NO_REPLY` replies, and adds focused tests plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main drops partial reply-media failures without warning when any media survives, and catastrophic final-payload normalization clears media without adding warning text. I did not run tests in this read-only review, so this is source-reproducible rather than an executed reproduction.
